original_text:
### Capitalization & Casing
- **Headlines/headings:** Initial caps (title case) — capitalize nouns, pronouns, adjectives, verbs, adverbs; lowercase articles, conjunctions, prepositions. Example: *LISRAYA Targets the Root Cause of Dermatomyositis*.
- **Campaign headline "YOU DESERVE MORE": ALL CAPS, always** (see 1.6).
- **Chart/infographic headlines: ALL CAPS**, set in Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email fallback).
- Body copy: sentence case.
- **[GENERAL]** Do not use ALL CAPS for body copy, buttons, or subheads other than the cases above.

relations.note: The global restriction against ALL CAPS in subheads/buttons is refined by the campaign headline lockup exception.
Chart headlines act as an approved exception to the global prohibition of ALL CAPS style outside standard headings.

quotes: Headlines/headings: Initial caps (title case) — capitalize nouns, pronouns, adjectives, verbs, adverbs; lowercase articles, conjunctions, prepositions.

rules.intent: Maintain uniform brand hierarchy through distinct capitalization conventions.
rules.rule_text: Headlines and headings must use Initial caps/title case (case.general.headline = "title_case"), while standard body copy must use sentence case (case.general.body = "sentence_case").

quotes: Campaign headline "YOU DESERVE MORE": ALL CAPS, always
Campaign headline "YOU DESERVE MORE": ALL CAPS, always

rules.intent: Ensure absolute visual consistency for the core campaign message lockup.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline "YOU DESERVE MORE" must always appear in ALL CAPS (campaign.headline.case = "all_caps").

quotes: Chart/infographic headlines: ALL CAPS, set in Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email fallback).
Chart/infographic headlines: ALL CAPS, set in Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email fallback).

rules.intent: Establish clear hierarchical separation and high legibility for chart labels and infographics.
rules.rule_text: Chart/infographic headlines must be presented in ALL CAPS (case.campaign.headline = "all_caps") and styled with Nunito Sans Bold+ fallback ('Nunito Sans', Verdana, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif) for digital/email content.

quotes: Do not use ALL CAPS for body copy, buttons, or subheads other than the cases above.
Do not use ALL CAPS for body copy, buttons, or subheads other than the cases above.

rules.intent: Prevent excessive or clinical casing choices that reduce readability.
rules.rule_text: Do not use ALL CAPS styling for body copy, buttons, or subheads unless explicitly sanctioned by specific exception rules (such as campaign or infographic headlines).
